raw_consumer_statement:
Citi is refusing to correct a billing error involving duplicate balance transfer postings and a misapplied refund. 
The underlying merchant transaction was ruled in my favor by XXXX, and a full refund of {$440.00} was issued on XX/XX/year>. 
Citi later posted duplicate Transfer Balance Between charges and an unrelated partial credit of - {$100.00}, leaving an incorrect outstanding balance. 
Citi denied my dispute citing untimely contact, despite the billing errors occurring after the refund and well within the timeframe to dispute the incorrect postings. 
This is a billing error under the Fair Credit Billing Act, not a merchant dispute.

I am requesting correction of the account to reflect a net {$0.00} balance and removal of any negative credit reporting related to this error.
